namespace.name: ConformanceLambda
namespace.description: Minimal API surface used by the fastify build-conformance suite (lambda compute target). Locked — do not couple to lending or any other canonical example. Mirrors fixture-ecs so the lambda build path also exercises the api-cell ↔ output-openapi rendering of object Fields (build/typecheck only — the lambda fixture has no runtime block).

endpoints.description: Convert a payload from one shape to another. Carries object Fields in the request body to gate the api-cell ↔ output-openapi rendering chain.
